title: Write a full LV test with render_async + create_user + db assert
prompt: Write `test/my_app_web/live/dashboard_live_test.exs` that: (1) uses `MyAppWeb.ConnCase` with `async: true`, (2) creates a user before mounting, (3) mounts the LV via `{:ok, lv, _html} = live(conn, ~p"/dashboard")`, (4) calls `render_async(lv)` to await the LV's internal `assign_async` data, (5) asserts the rendered HTML contains the user's email. Must include `render_async(lv)` and use `~p"/dashboard"` for the route.
tier_rationale: Integration test template — must compose ConnCase, LiveViewTest, create_user, render_async.
